title: RT International Call Center CRM & AI Utility Extraction Portal
executive_summary: RT International is a specialized, multi-role Call Center Portal and CRM system tailored for the UK commercial utility brokerage industry. The platform empowers frontline agents to manage commercial clients, document current utility metrics (electricity and gas), leverage advanced AI to parse unstructured broker call notes, schedule callbacks, initiate account transfers, and submit finalized sales with structured banking and contract information.
problem_statement: Unstructured Data Loss: Critical rates, supply numbers (MPAN/MPRN), serial numbers, and contract end dates are frequently buried in unstructured text notes, leading to transcription errors and loss of data integrity.
Disconnected Pipeline: Call center agents struggle to transition leads seamlessly from the initial callback to the transfer phase and final sale phase without losing key rate data.
Lack of Manager Visibility: Without localized management dashboards, managers cannot view agent conversion rates, track schedules, or re-assign callbacks efficiently.

Compliance & Banking Risks: Submitting commercial utility sales requires collecting sensitive banking info (Sort Code, Account Number, payment method, etc.) which must be validated and logged securely.

responsibilities: Submit final sale applications with banking details
Create/edit team callbacks, transfers, and sales
View team activity logs and real-time sales/transfer notifications

requirements: Users must log in via email and password to receive a JWT access token
The system must enforce strict role-based access control (RBAC)
Admins must be able to create, read, update, and disable Manager and Agent accounts
Managers can only view and edit records belonging to agents within their managed team
Agents can create a Customer profile with business details and utility type
Each Customer can have multiple Electricity Meters with supply number, rates, and contract details
Each Customer can have multiple Gas Meters with supply number, rates, and contract details
Provide an AI parsing interface for unstructured call notes
Communicate with Cohere V2 endpoint using command-a-plus-05-2026 model
Extract utility parameters following UK energy broker conventions
Separate current meter rates from offered rates
Implement Regex Fallback Engine for basic field extraction if Cohere is offline
Agents can schedule callbacks for specific date/time
Callbacks can store multiple pricing offers for electricity and gas
Callback statuses include pending and done
Agents can create transfer requests for utility accounts
Transfer requests must collect banking information securely
Managers can monitor and manage team transfers
Agents can submit finalized sales applications
Sales require structured banking and contract information
Admins and managers can view platform-wide and team sales analytics

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS with custom dark mode themes

backend.security: JWT, bcrypt, Custom SQL Injection Middleware

key_pages.name: Dashboard
key_pages.description: Main dashboard (Agent, Manager, or Admin view)

security_requirements: Secure banking information handling for sales submissions
